title: Health Canada’s laws and guidance - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada’s laws and guidance
Acts and regulations that directly affect the health and safety of Canadians.
Acts, regulations and guidelines that help keep Canadians healthy and safe.

#### Acts and regulations
Acts and regulations that Health Canada is responsible for enforcing.

#### Regulatory transparency and openness
How Health Canada is making available more information about its regulatory decisions to the public.
Health Canada guidelines to support acts and regulations.
Agreements that Health Canada shares responsibility for with other departments, governments and stakeholders.

#### Community of Federal Regulators
How federal departments and agencies work together to make regulations for the benefit of Canadians.
